operators.desc_zh: 筛选并保留LLM估计的与验证任务高度相关的样本。 该算子使用LLM评估每个样本与指定验证任务的相关性。LLM从多个维度对样本进行评分，包括主题相关性、语言风格匹配、任务匹配、知识对齐和潜在实用性。每个维度按1-5的评分，5为最高。关键指标'llm_task_relevance'是这些维度分数的平均值。如果样本的平均分数达到或超过指定的最低阈值，则保留该样本。该算子使用API或Hugging Face模型进行评估。如果没有提供验证数据集或任务描述，则必须在应用过滤前手动调用'prepare_valid_feature'方法。

params.name: api_or_hf_model
params.desc: API or huggingface model name.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: The lowest score threshold to keep the sample.

params.name: is_hf_model
params.desc: Indicates if the model is from HuggingFace.

params.name: valid_dataset
params.desc: The dataset to use for validation.

params.name: task_desc
params.desc: The description of the validation task. If valid_dataset=None and task_desc=None, 'self.prepare_valid_feature' should be manually called before applying the filter.

params.name: n_shot
params.desc: The number of shots in validation.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按任务相关性分数过滤数据，保留与目标任务高度相关的样本，提升领域微调数据质量。

operators.name: maximum_line_length_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with a maximum line length within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 筛选器将最大行长度的样本保持在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with a maximum line length within a specified range. This operator filters out samples based on the length of their longest line. It retains samples where the maximum line length is within the specified `min_len` and `max_len` range. The maximum line length is computed by splitting the text into lines and measuring the length of each line. If the context is provided, it uses precomputed lines stored under the key 'lines' in the context. The maximum line length is cached in the 'max_line_length' field of the stats.
operators.desc_zh: 过滤出最大行长度在指定范围内的样本。 该算子根据样本中最长行的长度来过滤样本。它保留最长行长度在指定 `min_len` 和 `max_len` 范围内的样本。通过将文本拆分成行并测量每行的长度来计算最大行长度。如果提供了上下文，它会使用存储在上下文 'lines' 键下的预计算行。最大行长度缓存在 stats 的 'max_line_length' 字段中。

params.name: min_len
params.desc: The min filter length in this op, samples will be filtered if their maximum line length is below this parameter.

params.name: max_len
params.desc: The max filter length in this op, samples will be filtered if their maximum line length exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤最大行长度异常的文本，可去除代码dump、日志等非自然语言内容。

operators.name: perplexity_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with perplexity score in a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤以保持困惑分数在指定范围内的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with perplexity score in a specified range. This operator computes the perplexity of text samples using a Hugging Face tokenizer and a KenLM language model. It keeps samples with perplexity scores within the specified minimum and maximum values. The perplexity is calculated character-based by default. If the perplexity is already computed, it will be reused from the 'perplexity' field in the sample's stats. The operator supports batched operations for efficiency.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留指定困惑度范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子使用 Hugging Face 分词器和 KenLM 语言模型计算文本样本的困惑度。它保留困惑度分数在指定最小值和最大值范围内的样本。默认情况下，困惑度是基于字符计算的。如果困惑度已经计算过，则会从样本的 stats 中的 'perplexity' 字段重用。该算子支持批量操作以提高效率。

params.name: lang
params.desc: Compute perplexity for samples in which language.

params.name: min_ppl
params.desc: The min filter perplexity in this op.

params.name: max_ppl
params.desc: The max filter perplexity in this op.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用n-gram语言模型计算困惑度过滤低质量文本，无需HF模型，适合大规模预训练语料粗筛。

operators.name: phrase_grounding_recall_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples based on the phrase grounding recall of phrases extracted from text in images.
operators.summary_zh: 根据从图像中的文本中提取的短语接地召回来过滤以保留样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples based on the phrase grounding recall of phrases extracted from text in images. This operator uses a Hugging Face Owl-ViT model to locate phrases extracted from the text within the images. It keeps samples where the phrase grounding recall is within a specified range. The recall is computed by comparing the number of correctly located phrases to the total number of phrases. The operator can handle multiple images per text chunk and supports different strategies for reducing the recall values (e.g., average, max, min). It also allows for flipping images horizontally or vertically. The key metric 'phrase_grounding_recall' is computed and stored in the sample's stats. If no images are present, the recall is set to an empty array.
operators.desc_zh: 根据从图像中文本提取的短语的定位召回率来过滤样本。 该算子使用 Hugging Face Owl-ViT 模型来定位从文本中提取的短语在图像中的位置。它保留短语定位召回率在指定范围内的样本。召回率通过比较正确定位的短语数量与总短语数量来计算。该算子可以处理每个文本块中的多张图像，并支持不同的召回值归约策略（例如，平均值、最大值、最小值）。它还允许水平或垂直翻转图像。关键指标 'phrase_grounding_recall' 将被计算并存储在样本的 stats 中。如果没有图像，则召回率设置为空数组。

params.name: hf_owlvit
params.desc: Owl-ViT model name on huggingface to locate the phrases extracted from the text.

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: min_recall
params.desc: The min phrase grounding recall to keep samples.

params.name: max_recall
params.desc: The max phrase grounding recall to keep samples.

params.name: horizontal_flip
params.desc: Flip image horizontally (left to right).

params.name: vertical_flip
params.desc: Flip image vertically (top to bottom).

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all images. 'any': keep this sample if any images meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all images meet the condition.

params.name: reduce_mode
params.desc: reduce mode when one text corresponds to multiple images in a chunk. 'avg': Take the average of multiple values 'max': Take the max of multiple values 'min': Take the min of multiple values

params.name: iou_thr
params.desc: the IoU threshold for NMS-like post-process. If two predicted bboxes are overlap with an IoU larger than this threshold, the bbox with less confidence will be removed. Default: 0.5.

params.name: large_area_ratio_thr
params.desc: the area ratio threshold for filtering out those large predicted bboxes. If the area of a predicted bbox accounts for more than this ratio threshold of the whole image area, this bbox will be removed. Default: 0.95.

params.name: conf_thr
params.desc: the confidence score threshold for removing low-confidence bboxes. If the confidence score of a predicted bbox is lower than the threshold, this bbox will be removed. Default: 0.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤图文短语定位召回率低的样本，适合提升图文细粒度对齐训练数据质量。

operators.name: special_characters_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with special-character ratio within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器，以将具有特殊字符比率的样本保持在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with special-character ratio within a specific range. This operator filters out samples based on the ratio of special characters in the text. It keeps samples where the special-character ratio is within the specified minimum and maximum thresholds. The special-character ratio is computed as the number of special characters divided by the total number of characters in the text. If the 'special_char_ratio' is already cached in the stats, it will be reused. Otherwise, it will be computed and stored in the 'special_char_ratio' field.
operators.desc_zh: 过滤出特殊字符比率在特定范围内的样本。 该算子根据文本中特殊字符的比例来过滤样本。它保留特殊字符比例在指定最小值和最大值阈值范围内的样本。特殊字符比例计算为特殊字符数量除以文本中的总字符数。如果 'special_char_ratio' 已经缓存在 stats 中，将重用该值。否则，将计算并存储在 'special_char_ratio' 字段中。

params.name: min_ratio
params.desc: The min filter ratio in this op, samples will be filtered if their special-char ratio is below this parameter.

params.name: max_ratio
params.desc: The max filter ratio in this op, samples will be filtered if their special-char ratio exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤特殊符号占比过高的文本，可去除乱码、编码错误或符号刷屏类噪声。

operators.name: specified_field_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter samples based on the specified field information.
operators.summary_zh: 根据指定的字段信息筛选样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter samples based on the specified field information. This operator checks if the value of a specified field in each sample is within a given target value range. If the field value is not within the target range, the sample is filtered out. The field can be a multi-level key, with levels separated by dots. The target value is a list of acceptable values for the field. If the field value is not a list or tuple, it is converted to a list for comparison. Samples are retained if all values in the field match any of the target values. - Uses the 'field_key' and 'target_value' parameters. - Supports multi-level field keys, e.g., 'level1.level2'. - Converts non-list/tuple field values to a list for comparison.
operators.desc_zh: 根据指定字段信息过滤样本。 该算子检查每个样本中指定字段的值是否在给定的目标值范围内。如果字段值不在目标范围内，则过滤掉该样本。字段可以是多级键，级别之间用点分隔。目标值是字段的可接受值列表。如果字段值不是列表或元组，则将其转换为列表进行比较。如果字段中的所有值都匹配任何目标值，则保留样本。 - 使用 'field_key' 和 'target_value' 参数。 - 支持多级字段键，例如 'level1.level2'。 - 将非列表/元组字段值转换为列表进行比较。

params.name: field_key
params.desc: Filter based on the specified value corresponding to the target key. The target key corresponding to multi-level field information need to be separated by '.'.

params.name: target_value
params.desc: The range of specified field information corresponding to the samples that need to be retained.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按样本任意指定字段的值做条件过滤，适合基于元数据字段快速筛选数据子集。

operators.name: specified_numeric_field_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter samples based on a specified numeric field value.
operators.summary_zh: 根据指定的数值字段值筛选样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter samples based on a specified numeric field value. This operator filters out samples if the numeric value in the specified field is not within the given range. The field can be multi-level, with keys separated by dots. The sample is kept if the numeric value is between the minimum and maximum values, inclusive. If the field key is not provided, all samples are retained. The operator ensures that the field exists in the sample and that its value is numeric before performing the comparison. - Uses the 'min_value' and 'max_value' to define the acceptable range. - Supports multi-level fields using dot-separated keys. - Returns False for non-numeric or out-of-range values, filtering the sample.
operators.desc_zh: 根据指定的数值字段值过滤样本。 该算子会过滤掉不在给定范围内的数值字段的样本。字段可以是多级的，键之间用点分隔。如果数值在最小值和最大值之间（包括最小值和最大值），则保留样本。如果没有提供字段键，则保留所有样本。算子在进行比较之前会确保样本中存在该字段且其值为数值类型。 - 使用 'min_value' 和 'max_value' 来定义可接受的范围。 - 支持使用点分隔键的多级字段。 - 对于非数值或超出范围的值返回 False，从而过滤样本。

params.name: field_key
params.desc: Filter based on the specified numeric value corresponding to the target key. The target key corresponding to multi-level field information need to be separated by '.'.

params.name: min_value
params.desc: The min filter value in SpecifiedNumericField op, samples will be filtered if their specified numeric field value is below this parameter.

params.name: max_value
params.desc: The max filter value in SpecifiedNumericField op, samples will be filtered if their specified numeric field value exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按数值字段范围过滤样本，适合按已有评分、长度、计数等数值指标筛选数据。

operators.name: stopwords_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with stopword ratio within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将停止词比率的样本保持在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with stopword ratio within a specified range. This operator calculates the ratio of stopwords in a sample and keeps samples where this ratio is between the specified minimum and maximum values. The stopword ratio is computed as the number of stopwords divided by the total number of words. If the `tokenization` parameter is set, a Hugging Face tokenizer is used to tokenize the text. The stopwords are loaded from a directory, and if the language is set to "all", it merges stopwords from all available languages. The key metric is `stopwords_ratio`, which is character-based by default. The operator also supports word augmentation for specific languages.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留停用词比率在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子计算样本中停用词的比例，并保留该比例在指定最小值和最大值范围内的样本。停用词比率计算为停用词数量除以总词数。如果设置了 `tokenization` 参数，则使用 Hugging Face 分词器对文本进行分词。停用词从一个目录中加载，如果语言设置为 "all"，则合并所有可用语言的停用词。关键指标是 `stopwords_ratio`，默认情况下是基于字符的。该算子还支持特定语言的词增强。

params.name: lang
params.desc: Consider stopwords in what language. If lang == "all", we will adopt the one merged from all the available languages

params.name: tokenization
params.desc: whether to use model to tokenize documents

params.name: min_ratio
params.desc: The min filter ratio in this op.

params.name: max_ratio
params.desc: The max filter ratio in this op.

params.name: stopwords_dir
params.desc: The directory storing the stopwords file(s) whose name includes "stopwords" and in json format

params.name: use_words_aug
params.desc: Whether to augment words, especially for Chinese and Vietnamese

params.name: words_aug_group_sizes
params.desc: The group size of words to augment

params.name: words_aug_join_char
params.desc: The join char between words to augment

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按停用词占比过滤文本，可识别并去除信息密度极低的垃圾或模板化内容。

operators.name: suffix_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with specified suffix.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器以保留具有指定后缀的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with specified suffix. This operator retains samples that have a suffix matching any of the provided suffixes. If no suffixes are specified, all samples are kept. The key metric 'keep' is computed based on whether the sample's suffix matches the specified list. The 'suffix' field of each sample is checked against the list of allowed suffixes. If the suffix matches, the sample is kept; otherwise, it is filtered out.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留具有指定后缀的样本的过滤器。 该算子保留后缀与提供的后缀之一匹配的样本。如果没有指定后缀，则保留所有样本。关键指标 'keep' 是根据样本的后缀是否与指定列表匹配来计算的。每个样本的 'suffix' 字段将与允许的后缀列表进行比较。如果后缀匹配，则保留样本；否则，过滤掉样本。

params.name: suffixes
params.desc: the suffix of text that will be keep. For example: '.txt', 'txt' or ['txt', '.pdf', 'docx']

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按文件后缀名保留或排除特定格式的样本，适合混合格式数据集的快速粗筛。

operators.name: text_action_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep texts that contain a minimum number of actions.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤以保留包含最少数量操作的文本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep texts that contain a minimum number of actions. This operator uses a Spacy model to detect actions in the text. It keeps samples if the number of detected actions meets or exceeds the specified minimum. The supported languages are English ('en') and Chinese ('zh'). The 'num_action' statistic is computed and cached for each sample. Actions are identified based on part-of-speech (POS) tags and specific tags for verbs.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留包含最少动作数量的文本的过滤器。 该算子使用 Spacy 模型检测文本中的动作。如果检测到的动作数量达到或超过指定的最小值，则保留样本。支持的语言是英语 ('en') 和中文 ('zh')。'num_action' 统计数据为每个样本计算并缓存。动作基于词性 (POS) 标签和特定动词标签进行识别。

params.name: lang
params.desc: language of the text in the samples. 'en' for detection of actions in English and 'zh' for detection of actions in Chinese.

params.name: min_action_num
params.desc: The min action number in the filtering. samples will be filtered if their action number in the text is below this parameter.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤动作词比例异常的文本，可筛除列表、标题等缺乏叙述性的低质量片段。

operators.name: text_embd_similarity_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep texts whose average embedding similarity to a set of given validation texts falls within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器，以保留与一组给定验证文本的平均嵌入相似度在特定范围内的文本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep texts whose average embedding similarity to a set of given validation texts falls within a specific range. This operator computes the cosine similarity between the text embeddings and a set of validation text embeddings. It keeps samples where the average similarity score is within the specified range. The key metric, 'text_embd_similarity', is computed as the mean cosine similarity. The operator supports both API-based and Hugging Face model- based embeddings. If no valid dataset is provided, the `prepare_valid_feature` method must be called manually before applying the filter.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留与一组给定验证文本的平均嵌入相似度在特定范围内的文本的过滤器。 该算子计算文本嵌入与一组验证文本嵌入之间的余弦相似度。如果平均相似度得分在指定范围内，则保留样本。关键指标 'text_embd_similarity' 计算为平均余弦相似度。算子支持基于 API 和基于 Hugging Face 模型的嵌入。如果没有提供有效的数据集，则必须在应用过滤之前手动调用 `prepare_valid_feature` 方法。

params.name: api_or_hf_model
params.desc: API or huggingface embedding model name.

params.name: is_hf_model
params.desc: Indicates if the model is from HuggingFace.

params.name: api_endpoint
params.desc: Embedding URL endpoint for the API.

params.name: response_path
params.desc: Path to extract content from the API response. Defaults to 'data.0.embedding' for embedding model.

params.name: model_params
params.desc: Parameters for initializing the API model.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: The min average similarity to keep samples.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: The max average similarity to keep samples.

params.name: valid_dataset
params.desc: The dataset to use for validation. If None, 'self.prepare_valid_feature' should be manually called before applying the filter.

params.name: ebd_dim
params.desc: The embedding's dimension via API. API specific parameter, i.e., if is_hf_model=True, this parameter will not take effect.

params.name: pooling
params.desc: strategy to extract embedding from the hidden states. https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.01807 None: default option, the hidden state of the last token. "mean": uniform mean of hidden states. "weighted_mean": weighted mean of hidden states. https://arxiv.org/abs/2202.08904 HF_MODEL specific parameter, i.e., if is_hf_model=False, this parameter will not take effect.

params.name: input_template
params.desc: Template for building the model input.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用API计算文本与参考文本的嵌入相似度并过滤，适合按语义相关性筛选领域数据。

operators.name: text_entity_dependency_filter
operators.summary_en: Identify and filter text samples based on entity dependencies.
operators.summary_zh: 根据实体依赖关系识别和过滤文本样本。
operators.desc_en: Identify and filter text samples based on entity dependencies. This operator uses a spaCy model to detect entities in the text and evaluates their dependency relationships. It filters out samples where entities have fewer than a specified number of dependency edges. The key metric is 'num_dependency_edges', which counts the number of edges for each entity in the dependency tree. Samples with no detected entities are omitted. The operator supports 'any' or 'all' strategies: 'any' keeps samples if at least one entity meets the dependency threshold, while 'all' requires all entities to meet the threshold. Supported languages are English ('en') and Chinese ('zh').
operators.desc_zh: 根据实体依赖关系识别并过滤文本样本。 该算子使用spaCy模型检测文本中的实体，并评估它们的依赖关系。它会过滤掉实体依赖边少于指定数量的样本。关键指标是'num_dependency_edges'，它计算每个实体在依赖树中的边数。没有检测到实体的样本将被忽略。该算子支持'any'或'all'策略：'any'策略会在至少一个实体满足依赖阈值时保留样本，而'all'策略要求所有实体都满足阈值。支持的语言是英语（'en'）和中文（'zh'）。

params.name: lang
params.desc: language of the text in the samples. 'en' for detection of entities in English and 'zh' for detection of entities in Chinese.

params.name: min_dependency_num
params.desc: The min token number in the filtering. Objects is independent if their number of edges in the dependency tree is below this parameter.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy. 'any': keep this sample if any object is dependent. 'all': keep this sample only if all images are dependent.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤高度依赖上下文命名实体的碎片化文本，适合去除缺失上下文的孤立段落。

operators.name: text_length_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with total text length within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤以保持文本总长度在特定范围内的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with total text length within a specific range. This operator filters out samples based on their total text length. It retains samples where the text length is between the specified minimum and maximum lengths. The text length is computed as the number of characters in the sample's text. If the 'text_len' key is already present in the sample's stats, it will be reused; otherwise, it will be computed. The operator processes samples in batches for efficiency.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留总文本长度在特定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子根据样本的总文本长度过滤样本。它保留文本长度在指定最小值和最大值之间的样本。文本长度计算为样本文本中的字符数。如果样本的统计信息中已经存在'text_len'键，则会重用它；否则，将会计算。该算子批量处理样本以提高效率。

params.name: min_len
params.desc: The min text length in the filtering. samples will be filtered if their text length is below this parameter.

params.name: max_len
params.desc: The max text length in the filtering. samples will be filtered if their text length exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按字符数范围过滤文本，是预训练/SFT数据清洗最常用的基础长度控制步骤之一。

operators.name: text_pair_similarity_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep text pairs with similarities within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤以将具有相似性的文本对保持在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep text pairs with similarities within a specific range. This operator computes the similarity between two texts in a pair using a Hugging Face CLIP model. It keeps samples where the similarity score falls within the specified min and max thresholds. The key metric, 'text_pair_similarity', is computed as the cosine similarity between the text embeddings. The operator supports two strategies for keeping samples: 'any' (keep if any pair meets the condition) and 'all' (keep only if all pairs meet the condition). If the second text key is not provided, the operator will raise an error. The similarity scores are cached under the 'text_pair_similarity' field in the sample's stats.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留相似度在特定范围内的文本对的过滤器。 该算子使用Hugging Face CLIP模型计算一对文本之间的相似度。它保留相似度得分在指定最小值和最大值之间的样本。关键指标'text_pair_similarity'计算为文本嵌入之间的余弦相似度。该算子支持两种保留样本的策略：'any'（只要有任何一对满足条件就保留）和'all'（只有当所有对都满足条件时才保留）。如果不提供第二个文本键，该算子将引发错误。相似度分数会被缓存在样本统计信息的'text_pair_similarity'字段中。

params.name: hf_clip
params.desc: clip model name on huggingface to compute the similarity between image and text.

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: The min similarity to keep samples.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: The max similarity to keep samples.

params.name: text_key_second
params.desc: used to store the other sentence in the text pair.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all images. 'any': keep this sample if any images meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all images meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤文本对语义相似度不达标的样本，适合平行语料、问答对等双文本数据集的质量控制。

operators.name: token_num_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with a total token number within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 筛选器将总令牌数的样本保留在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with a total token number within a specified range. This operator uses a Hugging Face tokenizer to count the number of tokens in each sample. It keeps samples where the token count is between the minimum and maximum thresholds. The token count is stored in the 'num_token' field of the sample's stats. If the token count is not already computed, it will be calculated using the specified tokenizer.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留总token数在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子使用Hugging Face分词器计算每个样本中的token数量。它保留token数量在最小值和最大值之间的样本。token数量存储在样本统计信息的'num_token'字段中。如果尚未计算token数量，将使用指定的分词器进行计算。

params.name: hf_tokenizer
params.desc: the tokenizer name of Hugging Face tokenizers.

params.name: min_num
params.desc: The min filter token number in this op, samples will be filtered if their token number is below this parameter.

params.name: max_num
params.desc: The max filter token number in this op, samples will be filtered if their token number exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按tokenizer计算的token数范围过滤文本，适合控制训练样本长度分布、避免截断损失。

operators.name: video_aesthetics_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep data samples with aesthetics scores for specified frames in the videos within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将视频中指定帧的美学得分数据样本保留在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep data samples with aesthetics scores for specified frames in the videos within a specific range. This operator evaluates the aesthetic quality of video frames using a Hugging Face model. It keeps samples where the aesthetics scores of the specified frames fall within a given range. The key metric, 'video_frames_aesthetics_score', is computed by averaging, taking the max, or min of the frame scores, depending on the reduce mode. Frame sampling can be done uniformly or by extracting all keyframes. The filter applies a 'any' or 'all' strategy to decide if a sample should be kept based on the scores of multiple videos.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留视频中指定帧的美学评分在特定范围内的数据样本的过滤器。 该算子使用Hugging Face模型评估视频帧的美学质量。它保留指定帧的美学评分在给定范围内的样本。关键指标'video_frames_aesthetics_score'通过平均、取最大值或最小值的方式计算帧评分，具体取决于归约模式。帧采样可以均匀进行或提取所有关键帧。该过滤器应用'any'或'all'策略来决定是否根据多个视频的评分保留样本。

params.name: hf_scorer_model
params.desc: Huggingface model name for the aesthetics predictor. By default, we will use 'shunk031/aesthetics-predictor-v2-sac-logos-ava1-l14-linearMSE', refer to pypi.org/project/simple-aesthetics-predictor

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: Min score for the predicted aesthetics in a video.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: Max score for the predicted aesthetics in a video.

params.name: frame_field
params.desc: the field name of video frames to calculate the aesthetic score. If frame_field is None, extract frames from the video field.

params.name: frame_sampling_method
params.desc: sampling method of extracting frame images from the videos. Should be one of ["all_keyframes", "uniform"]. The former one extracts all key frames and the latter one extract specified number of frames uniformly from the video. Default: "uniform" with frame_num=3, considering that the number of keyframes can be large while their difference is usually small in terms of their aesthetics.

params.name: frame_num
params.desc: the number of frames to be extracted uniformly from the video. Only works when frame_sampling_method is "uniform" or "frame_field" is given. If it's 1, only the middle frame will be extracted. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be extracted. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be extracted uniformly within the video duration.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: Keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: reduce_mode
params.desc: reduce mode when one sample corresponds to multiple frames, must be one of ['avg','max', 'min']. 'avg': Take the average of multiple values 'max': Take the max of multiple values 'min': Take the min of multiple values

params.name: args
params.desc: Extra positional arguments.

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: Extra keyword arguments.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用HF模型评估视频审美质量并过滤低分样本，适合视频生成模型训练数据的质量筛选。

operators.name: video_aspect_ratio_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with video aspect ratio within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将视频纵横比的样本保持在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with video aspect ratio within a specific range. This operator filters samples based on the aspect ratios of their videos. It keeps samples where the video aspect ratios fall within a specified range. The aspect ratio is calculated as the width divided by the height (W / H). The operator supports two strategies for keeping samples: 'any' and 'all'. In 'any' mode, a sample is kept if at least one video meets the aspect ratio condition. In 'all' mode, all videos in the sample must meet the condition for the sample to be kept. The aspect ratios are computed and stored in the 'video_aspect_ratios' field of the sample's stats.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留视频宽高比在特定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子根据视频的宽高比过滤样本。它保留视频宽高比在指定范围内的样本。宽高比计算为宽度除以高度（W / H）。该算子支持两种保留样本的策略：'any' 和 'all'。在 'any' 模式下，如果至少有一个视频满足宽高比条件，则保留该样本。在 'all' 模式下，样本中的所有视频都必须满足条件才能保留该样本。宽高比被计算并存储在样本的 stats 中的 'video_aspect_ratios' 字段中。

params.name: min_ratio
params.desc: The minimum aspect ratio to keep samples, supported format is a string, such as "9:21" or "9/21".

params.name: max_ratio
params.desc: The maximum aspect ratio to keep samples, supported format is a string, such as "21:9" or "21/9".

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按宽高比范围过滤视频，去除过于极端的竖版或横版视频，适合视频模型数据规格统一。

operators.name: video_duration_filter
operators.summary_en: Keep data samples whose videos' durations are within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 保留视频持续时间在指定范围内的数据样本。
operators.desc_en: Keep data samples whose videos' durations are within a specified range. This operator filters data samples based on the duration of their associated videos. It keeps samples where the video durations fall within a specified minimum and maximum range. The filtering strategy can be set to 'any' or 'all': - 'any': Keep the sample if any of its videos meet the duration criteria. - 'all': Keep the sample only if all of its videos meet the duration criteria. The video durations are computed and stored in the 'video_duration' field of the sample's stats. If no videos are present, an empty array is stored.
operators.desc_zh: 保留视频时长在指定范围内的数据样本。 该算子根据关联视频的时长过滤数据样本。它保留视频时长在指定最小和最大范围内的样本。过滤策略可以设置为 'any' 或 'all': - 'any': 如果样本中的任何视频满足时长条件，则保留该样本。 - 'all': 只有当样本中的所有视频都满足时长条件时，才保留该样本。视频时长被计算并存储在样本的 stats 中的 'video_duration' 字段中。如果没有视频存在，则存储一个空数组。

params.name: min_duration
params.desc: The min video duration to keep samples in seconds. It's 0 by default.

params.name: max_duration
params.desc: The max video duration to keep samples in seconds. It's sys.maxsize by default.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: video_backend
params.desc: video backend, can be `ffmpeg`, `av`.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 保留时长在指定区间的视频样本，过滤过短片段和过长视频，是视频数据集的基础清洗步骤。

operators.name: video_frames_text_similarity_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples based on the similarity between video frame images and text within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 根据视频帧图像和文本之间的相似性进行过滤，以保持样本在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples based on the similarity between video frame images and text within a specific range. This operator uses a Hugging Face CLIP model to compute the similarity between video frames and associated text. It keeps samples where the computed similarity scores fall within a specified range. The operator supports different frame sampling methods, including 'all_keyframes' and 'uniform', and allows for horizontal and vertical flipping of the frames. The similarity score is reduced using one of three modes: 'avg', 'max', or 'min'. The operator also supports two strategies for keeping samples: 'any' (keep if any video meets the condition) or 'all' (keep only if all videos meet the condition). The key metric is stored in the 'video_frames_text_similarity' field.
operators.desc_zh: 基于视频帧图像与文本之间的相似度在特定范围内的过滤保留样本。 该算子使用 Hugging Face CLIP 模型来计算视频帧与关联文本之间的相似度。它保留计算出的相似度得分在指定范围内的样本。该算子支持不同的帧采样方法，包括 'all_keyframes' 和 'uniform'，并且允许对帧进行水平和垂直翻转。相似度得分通过三种模式之一进行归约：'avg'、'max' 或 'min'。该算子还支持两种保留样本的策略：'any'（如果有任何视频满足条件则保留）或 'all'（只有当所有视频都满足条件时才保留）。关键指标存储在 'video_frames_text_similarity' 字段中。

params.name: hf_clip
params.desc: clip model name on huggingface to compute the similarity between frame image and text. It's kind of language-related. For example, for Chinese datasets, ChineseCLIP might be a better choice.

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: the min similarity to keep samples.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: the max similarity to keep samples.

params.name: frame_sampling_method
params.desc: sampling method of extracting frame images from the videos. Should be one of ["all_keyframes", "uniform"]. The former one extracts all key frames (the number of which depends on the duration of the video) and the latter one extract specified number of frames uniformly from the video. Default: "all_keyframes".

params.name: frame_num
params.desc: the number of frames to be extracted uniformly from the video. Only works when frame_sampling_method is "uniform". If it's 1, only the middle frame will be extracted. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be extracted. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be extracted uniformly within the video duration.

params.name: horizontal_flip
params.desc: flip frame image horizontally (left to right).

params.name: vertical_flip
params.desc: flip frame image vertically (top to bottom).

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: reduce_mode
params.desc: reduce mode when one text corresponds to multiple video frame images in a chunk. 'avg': Take the average of multiple values 'max': Take the max of multiple values 'min': Take the min of multiple values

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_label: 视频帧文本相似度过滤
operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤视频关键帧与配套文本语义相似度低的样本，适合视频-文本预训练数据的对齐质量控制。

operators.name: video_motion_score_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores from OpenCV within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将来自OpenCV的视频运动分数的样本保持在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores from OpenCV within a specific range. The operator uses Farneback's algorithm from OpenCV to compute dense optical flow. It calculates the average motion score for each video and retains samples based on the specified minimum and maximum score thresholds. The 'any' or 'all' strategy determines whether to keep a sample if any or all videos meet the criteria. The motion score is computed as the mean magnitude of the optical flow, which can be normalized relative to the frame's diagonal length. The stats are cached under the key 'video_motion_score'.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留 OpenCV 视频运动分数在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子使用 OpenCV 中的 Farneback 算法计算稠密光流。它为每个视频计算平均运动分数，并根据指定的最小和最大分数阈值保留样本。'any' 或 'all' 策略决定只要任意视频或所有视频满足条件时是否保留样本。运动分数被计算为光流幅值的均值，该值可相对于帧对角线长度进行归一化。统计信息缓存在键 'video_motion_score' 下。

params.name: min_score
params.desc: The minimum motion score to keep samples.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: The maximum motion score to keep samples.

params.name: frame_field
params.desc: the field name of video frames to compute motion score. If frame_field is None, extract frames from the video field.

params.name: sampling_fps
params.desc: The sampling rate in frames_per_second for optical flow calculations.

params.name: size
params.type: typing.Union[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], NoneType]
params.desc: Resize frames before computing optical flow. If size is a sequence like (h, w), frame size will be matched to this. If size is an int, smaller edge of frames will be matched to this number. i.e, if height > width, then frame will be rescaled to (size * height / width, size). Default `None` to keep the original size.

params.name: max_size
params.desc: The maximum allowed for the longer edge of resized frames. If the longer edge of frames is greater than max_size after being resized according to size, size will be overruled so that the longer edge is equal to max_size. As a result, the smaller edge may be shorter than size. This is only supported if size is an int.

params.name: divisible
params.desc: The number that the dimensions must be divisible by.

params.name: relative
params.desc: If `True`, the optical flow magnitude is normalized to a [0, 1] range, relative to the frame's diagonal length.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: if_output_optical_flow
params.desc: Determines whether to output the computed optical flows into the metas. The optical flows for each video will be stored in the shape of (num_frame, H, W, 2)

params.name: optical_flow_key
params.desc: The field name to store the optical flows. It's "video_optical_flow" in default.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 纯CPU计算视频运动幅度并过滤静止或抖动过剧的片段，适合视频理解训练数据初筛。

operators.name: video_motion_score_ptlflow_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores from ptlflow within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器以将来自ptlflow的具有视频运动分数的样本保持在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores from ptlflow within a specified range. This operator utilizes the ptlflow library (https://github.com/hmorimitsu/ptlflow) to predict optical flow between video frames. It keeps samples where the video motion score is within the given min and max score range. The motion score is computed based on the optical flow between frames, which is estimated using the models supported in ptlflow. The operator can sample frames at a specified FPS and apply transformations to the frames before computing the flow. - The models in ptlflow is used to estimate the optical flow. - Frames are preprocessed using a series of transformations including normalization and color channel flipping. - The motion score is calculated from the optical flow data. - The operator can be configured to filter based on any or all frames in the video. - The device for model inference (CPU or CUDA) is automatically detected and set. For further details, refer to the official documentation: https://ptlflow.readthedocs.io/
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留 ptlflow 视频运动分数在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子利用 ptlflow 库（https://github.com/hmorimitsu/ptlflow）预测视频帧之间的光流。它保留视频运动分数在给定最小值和最大值范围内的样本。运动分数基于帧间光流计算，而光流由 ptlflow 支持的模型进行估计。该算子可以按指定 FPS 采样帧，并在计算光流前对帧应用变换。 - 使用 ptlflow 中的模型估计光流。 - 帧通过一系列变换进行预处理，包括归一化和颜色通道翻转。 - 运动分数从光流数据中计算得出。 - 可配置为基于视频中任意帧或所有帧进行过滤。 - 模型推理设备（CPU 或 CUDA）会自动检测并设置。 更多详情请参阅官方文档：https://ptlflow.readthedocs.io/

params.name: size
params.type: typing.Union[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], NoneType]

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用ptlflow光流模型精确计算视频运动分数，适合对运动质量要求高的视频生成数据集筛选。

operators.name: video_motion_score_raft_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将视频运动分数的样本保持在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with video motion scores within a specified range. This operator utilizes the RAFT (Recurrent All-Pairs Field Transforms) model from torchvision to predict optical flow between video frames. It keeps samples where the video motion score is within the given min and max score range. The motion score is computed based on the optical flow between frames, which is estimated using the RAFT model. The operator can sample frames at a specified FPS and apply transformations to the frames before computing the flow. - The RAFT model is used to estimate the optical flow. - Frames are preprocessed using a series of transformations including normalization and color channel flipping. - The motion score is calculated from the optical flow data. - The operator can be configured to filter based on any or all frames in the video. - The device for model inference (CPU or CUDA) is automatically detected and set. For further details, refer to the official torchvision documentation: https://pytorch.org/vision/main/models/raft.html The original paper on RAFT is available here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.12039
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留视频运动得分在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子利用 torchvision 中的 RAFT（Recurrent All-Pairs Field Transforms）模型来预测视频帧之间的光流。它保留视频运动得分在给定最小和最大得分范围内的样本。运动得分基于帧间的光流计算，该光流使用 RAFT 模型估计。该算子可以在指定 FPS 下采样帧，并在计算光流之前对帧应用变换。 - 使用 RAFT 模型估计光流。 - 帧经过一系列变换预处理，包括归一化和颜色通道翻转。 - 从光流数据计算运动得分。 - 该算子可以配置为基于视频中的任何或所有帧进行过滤。 - 自动检测并设置模型推理的设备（CPU 或 CUDA）。 更多详情，请参阅官方 torchvision 文档：https://pytorch.org/vision/main/models/raft.html RAFT 的原始论文可在此处找到：https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.12039

params.name: size
params.type: typing.Union[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], typing.Tuple[typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)], typing.Annotated[int, Gt(gt=0)]], NoneType]

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用RAFT光流算法计算视频运动分数过滤，比ptlflow更轻量，适合GPU资源有限时的运动质量筛选。

operators.name: video_nsfw_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos have nsfw scores in a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器以保留其视频的nsfw分数在指定范围内的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos have nsfw scores in a specified range. This operator uses a Hugging Face model to detect NSFW content in video frames. It keeps samples where the NSFW score is below a specified threshold. The operator supports two frame sampling methods: "all_keyframes" and "uniform". For "uniform", it extracts a specified number of frames. The NSFW scores are reduced using one of three modes: "avg", "max", or "min". The key metric, 'video_nsfw_score', is computed for each video and stored in the sample's stats. The operator can use either an "any" or "all" strategy to decide if a sample should be kept based on the NSFW scores of its videos.
operators.desc_zh: 用于保留视频 NSFW 得分在指定范围内的样本的过滤器。 该算子使用 Hugging Face 模型来检测视频帧中的 NSFW 内容。它保留 NSFW 得分低于指定阈值的样本。该算子支持两种帧采样方法："all_keyframes" 和 "uniform"。对于 "uniform"，它提取指定数量的帧。NSFW 得分通过三种模式之一进行归约："avg"、"max" 或 "min"。关键指标 'video_nsfw_score' 对每个视频进行计算并存储在样本的 stats 中。该算子可以使用 "any" 或 "all" 策略来决定是否基于其视频的 NSFW 得分保留样本。

params.name: hf_nsfw_model
params.desc: nsfw detection model name on huggingface.

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: min_score
params.desc: the nsfw score threshold for samples. range from 0 to 1. Samples with nsfw score greater than this threshold will be kept.

params.name: max_score
params.desc: the nsfw score threshold for samples. range from 0 to 1. Samples with nsfw score less than this threshold will be kept.

params.name: frame_field
params.desc: the field name of video frames to calculate the nsfw score. If frame_field is None, extract frames from the video field.

params.name: frame_sampling_method
params.desc: sampling method of extracting frame images from the videos. Should be one of ["all_keyframes", "uniform"]. The former one extracts all key frames (the number of which depends on the duration of the video) and the latter one extract specified number of frames uniformly from the video. Default: "all_keyframes".

params.name: frame_num
params.desc: the number of frames to be extracted uniformly from the video. Only works when frame_sampling_method is "uniform" or "frame_field" is given. If it's 1, only the middle frame will be extracted. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be extracted. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be extracted uniformly within the video duration.

params.name: reduce_mode
params.desc: reduce mode for multiple sampled video frames. 'avg': Take the average of multiple values 'max': Take the max of multiple values 'min': Take the min of multiple values

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: video_backend
params.desc: video backend, can be `ffmpeg`, `av`.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用HF模型检测视频NSFW内容并过滤，视频训练数据内容安全合规的必备步骤。

operators.name: video_ocr_area_ratio_filter
operators.summary_en: Keep data samples whose detected text area ratios for specified frames in the video are within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 保留检测到的视频中指定帧的文本面积比率在指定范围内的数据样本。
operators.desc_en: Keep data samples whose detected text area ratios for specified frames in the video are within a specified range. This operator filters data based on the ratio of the detected text area to the total frame area. It uses EasyOCR to detect text in the specified languages and calculates the area ratio for each sampled frame. The operator then determines whether to keep a sample based on the `any` or `all` strategy, which checks if any or all of the videos meet the specified area ratio range. The key metric, `video_ocr_area_ratio`, is computed as the mean of the text area ratios across the sampled frames. The number of sampled frames and the specific frames to be sampled can be configured.
operators.desc_zh: 保留视频中指定帧的检测文本区域比率在指定范围内的数据样本。 该算子根据检测到的文本区域与总帧面积的比例来过滤数据。它使用EasyOCR来检测指定语言中的文本，并计算每个采样帧的面积比例。然后，算子根据`any`或`all`策略决定是否保留样本，该策略检查是否有任何或所有视频满足指定的面积比例范围。关键指标`video_ocr_area_ratio`是通过采样帧中文本面积比例的平均值计算得出的。可以配置采样帧的数量和要采样的特定帧。

params.name: min_area_ratio
params.desc: The min ocr area ratio to keep samples. It's 0 by default.

params.name: max_area_ratio
params.desc: The max ocr area ratio to keep samples. It's 1.0 by default.

params.name: frame_sample_num
params.desc: The number of sampled frames to calculate the ocr area ratio. If it's 1, only middle frame will be selected. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be selected. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be sampled evenly within the video duration.

params.name: languages_to_detect
params.desc: texts in which languages should be detected. Default: ['ch_sim', 'en']. Full language list can be found here: https://www.jaided.ai/easyocr/.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤视频帧中文字区域占比异常的样本，可去除字幕过多或文字遮挡严重的视频片段。

operators.name: video_resolution_filter
operators.summary_en: Keep data samples whose videos' resolutions are within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 保留视频分辨率在指定范围内的数据样本。
operators.desc_en: Keep data samples whose videos' resolutions are within a specified range. This operator filters data samples based on the resolution of the videos they contain. It keeps samples if the video resolutions fall within the defined width and height ranges. The filtering strategy can be set to 'any' or 'all': - 'any': Keeps the sample if any video meets the resolution criteria. - 'all': Keeps the sample only if all videos meet the resolution criteria. The operator computes and caches the 'video_width' and 'video_height' for each video in the sample. If no videos are present, it sets these fields to empty arrays. These cached values are used to determine whether to keep or filter out the sample.
operators.desc_zh: 保留视频分辨率在指定范围内的数据样本。 该算子根据所含视频的分辨率来过滤数据样本。如果视频分辨率落在定义的宽度和高度范围内，则保留样本。过滤策略可以设置为'any'或'all': - 'any': 如果有任何视频满足分辨率标准，则保留样本。 - 'all': 只有当所有视频都满足分辨率标准时才保留样本。 算子计算并缓存样本中每个视频的'video_width'和'video_height'。如果没有视频存在，则将这些字段设置为空数组。这些缓存值用于确定是否保留或过滤掉样本。

params.name: min_width
params.desc: The min horizontal resolution.

params.name: max_width
params.desc: The max horizontal resolution.

params.name: min_height
params.desc: The min vertical resolution.

params.name: max_height
params.desc: The max vertical resolution.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按分辨率范围过滤视频，去除低画质或超高分辨率异常视频，是视频数据集的基础规格筛选。

operators.name: video_tagging_from_frames_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos contain specified tags.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器以保留其视频包含指定标签的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos contain specified tags. This operator filters video samples based on the presence of given tags in the video frames. It uses a Hugging Face tokenizer to extract and tag frames. The filtering can be configured to require any or all of the specified tags to be present. The operator supports two frame sampling methods: "all_keyframes" and "uniform". When using "uniform", the number of frames to sample can be specified. The extracted tags are stored in the meta field with the key 'video_frame_tags' by default. The decision to keep a sample is based on whether any or all of the video frames meet the tag criteria, as specified by the 'any_or_all' parameter.
operators.desc_zh: 筛选包含指定标签的视频样本。 该算子根据视频帧中是否存在给定标签来筛选视频样本。它使用 Hugging Face 分词器提取和标记帧。可以配置筛选条件，要求存在任何一个或所有指定的标签。该算子支持两种帧采样方法："all_keyframes" 和 "uniform"。当使用 "uniform" 时，可以指定要采样的帧数。提取的标签默认存储在 meta 字段中，键为 'video_frame_tags'。是否保留样本的决定基于视频帧是否满足标签条件，由 'any_or_all' 参数指定。

params.name: tags
params.desc: a tag list to shift the videos, total tags can be found in https://github.com/xinyu1205/recognize-anything/blob/main/ram/data/ram_tag_list.txt # noqa: E501

params.name: contain
params.desc: require the videos containing 'any' or 'all' tags. When tags equal to [], 'all' keeps all samples, 'any' keeps no sample.

params.name: frame_sampling_method
params.desc: sampling method of extracting frame images from the videos. Should be one of ["all_keyframes", "uniform"]. The former one extracts all key frames (the number of which depends on the duration of the video) and the latter one extract specified number of frames uniformly from the video. Default: "all_keyframes".

params.name: frame_num
params.desc: the number of frames to be extracted uniformly from the video. Only works when frame_sampling_method is "uniform". If it's 1, only the middle frame will be extracted. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be extracted. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be extracted uniformly within the video duration.

params.name: tag_field_name
params.desc: the key name to store the tags in the meta field. It's "video_frame_tags" in default.

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用GPU模型从视频帧提取标签并过滤不匹配的视频，适合按内容类别筛选视频训练数据。

operators.name: video_watermark_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos have no watermark with high probability.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器以保持其视频具有高概率没有水印的样本。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples whose videos have no watermark with high probability. This operator uses a Hugging Face watermark detection model to predict the probability of watermarks in video frames. It keeps samples where the predicted watermark probability is below a specified threshold. The key metric, 'video_watermark_prob', is computed by extracting frames from the video using a specified sampling method and then averaging, maximizing, or minimizing the probabilities based on the reduce mode. If multiple videos are present, the operator can use either an 'any' or 'all' strategy to determine if the sample should be kept. The frame sampling method can be 'all_keyframes' or 'uniform', and the reduce mode can be 'avg', 'max', or 'min'.
operators.desc_zh: 筛选出高概率没有水印的视频样本。 该算子使用 Hugging Face 水印检测模型预测视频帧中水印的概率。它保留预测水印概率低于指定阈值的样本。关键指标 'video_watermark_prob' 通过使用指定的采样方法从视频中提取帧，然后根据归约模式对概率进行平均、最大化或最小化来计算。如果有多个视频存在，该算子可以使用 'any' 或 'all' 策略来确定是否保留样本。帧采样方法可以是 'all_keyframes' 或 'uniform'，归约模式可以是 'avg'、'max' 或 'min'。

params.name: hf_watermark_model
params.desc: watermark detection model name on huggingface.

params.name: trust_remote_code
params.desc: whether to trust the remote code of HF models.

params.name: prob_threshold
params.desc: the predicted watermark probability threshold for samples. range from 0 to 1. Samples with watermark probability less than this threshold will be kept.

params.name: frame_sampling_method
params.desc: sampling method of extracting frame images from the videos. Should be one of ["all_keyframes", "uniform"]. The former one extracts all key frames (the number of which depends on the duration of the video) and the latter one extract specified number of frames uniformly from the video. Default: "all_keyframes".

params.name: frame_num
params.desc: the number of frames to be extracted uniformly from the video. Only works when frame_sampling_method is "uniform". If it's 1, only the middle frame will be extracted. If it's 2, only the first and the last frames will be extracted. If it's larger than 2, in addition to the first and the last frames, other frames will be extracted uniformly within the video duration.

params.name: reduce_mode
params.desc: reduce mode for multiple sampled video frames. 'avg': Take the average of multiple values 'max': Take the max of multiple values 'min': Take the min of multiple values

params.name: any_or_all
params.desc: keep this sample with 'any' or 'all' strategy of all videos. 'any': keep this sample if any videos meet the condition. 'all': keep this sample only if all videos meet the condition.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用HF模型检测并过滤含水印的视频片段，适合清洗版权敏感的视频训练数据。

operators.name: word_repetition_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with word-level n-gram repetition ratio within a specific range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将单词级n-gram重复比率的样本保持在特定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with word-level n-gram repetition ratio within a specific range. This operator calculates the word-level n-gram repetition ratio for each sample and filters out those that do not fall within the specified range. The n-gram length and the min/max ratio thresholds are configurable. If tokenization is enabled, a Hugging Face tokenizer is used to tokenize the text. The key metric, `word_rep_ratio`, is computed as the ratio of repeated n-grams to the total number of n-grams. This ratio is then compared against the min and max ratio thresholds to decide whether to keep or filter the sample. If the ratio is outside the specified range, the sample is filtered out.
operators.desc_zh: 筛选单词级 n-gram 重复比率在特定范围内的样本。 该算子计算每个样本的单词级 n-gram 重复比率，并过滤掉不在指定范围内的样本。n-gram 长度和最小/最大比率阈值是可配置的。如果启用分词，则使用 Hugging Face 分词器对文本进行分词。关键指标 `word_rep_ratio` 计算为重复 n-gram 与总 n-gram 数量的比率。然后将此比率与最小和最大比率阈值进行比较，以决定是否保留或过滤样本。如果比率超出指定范围，则过滤掉样本。

params.name: lang
params.desc: sample in which language.

params.name: tokenization
params.desc: whether to use model to tokenize documents

params.name: rep_len
params.desc: Repetition length for word-level n-gram.

params.name: min_ratio
params.desc: The min filter ratio in this op, samples will be filtered if their word-level n-gram repetition ratio is below this parameter.

params.name: max_ratio
params.desc: The max filter ratio in this op, samples will be filtered if their word-level n-gram repetition ratio exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 过滤词级重复率异常的文本，可去除模板填充、机器生成的低质量重复内容。

operators.name: words_num_filter
operators.summary_en: Filter to keep samples with a total word count within a specified range.
operators.summary_zh: 过滤器将样本的总字数保持在指定范围内。
operators.desc_en: Filter to keep samples with a total word count within a specified range. This operator filters samples based on the number of words they contain. It retains samples if their word count is within the given minimum and maximum limits. If tokenization is enabled, it uses a Hugging Face tokenizer to count words. The key metric `num_words` is computed and stored in the sample's stats under the `num_words` field. If the word count is already cached, it reuses the cached value to avoid redundant computation.
operators.desc_zh: 根据指定范围内的总词数来筛选样本。 该算子基于样本中的词数进行筛选。如果样本的词数在给定的最小值和最大值范围内，则保留这些样本。如果启用了分词功能，它将使用 Hugging Face 的分词器来计算词数。关键指标 `num_words` 会被计算并存储在样本的统计信息中，字段名为 `num_words`。如果词数已经缓存，则会重用缓存值以避免冗余计算。

params.name: lang
params.desc: sample in which language.

params.name: tokenization
params.desc: whether to use model to tokenize documents

params.name: min_num
params.desc: The min filter word number in this op, samples will be filtered if their word number is below this parameter.

params.name: max_num
params.desc: The max filter word number in this op, samples will be filtered if their word number exceeds this parameter.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按词数范围过滤文本，是预训练/SFT数据清洗最常用的基础长度控制步骤之一。

operators.summary_zh: 类用于加载和格式化csv类型的文件。

operators.desc_zh: 该类用于加载和格式化 CSV 类型的文件。 默认后缀为 `['.csv']`

params.desc: The empty dataset length.

operators.name: tsv_formatter
operators.summary_en: The class is used to load and format tsv-type files.
operators.summary_zh: 该类用于加载和格式化tsv类型的文件。
operators.desc_en: The class is used to load and format tsv-type files. Default suffixes is `['.tsv']`
operators.desc_zh: 该类用于加载和格式化 TSV 类型的文件。 默认后缀为 `['.tsv']`

params.name: dataset_path
params.desc: a dataset file or a dataset directory

params.name: suffixes
params.desc: files with specified suffixes to be processed

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args, e.g. `delimiter = ','`

operators.zh_usage_tip: 将TSV文件转为统一数据集格式，适合处理制表符分隔的结构化文本语料。

operators.name: key_value_grouper
operators.summary_en: Groups samples into batches based on values in specified keys.
operators.summary_zh: 根据指定键中的值将样本分组为批处理。
operators.desc_en: Groups samples into batches based on values in specified keys. This operator groups samples by the values of the given keys, which can be nested. If no keys are provided, it defaults to using the text key. It uses a naive grouping strategy to batch samples with identical key values. The resulting dataset is a list of batched samples, where each batch contains samples that share the same key values. This is useful for organizing data by specific attributes or features.
operators.desc_zh: 根据指定键的值对样本进行分组。 该算子根据给定键的值对样本进行分组，这些键可以是嵌套的。如果没有提供键，则默认使用文本键。它使用一种简单的分组策略来将具有相同键值的样本分批。生成的数据集是一个批次样本列表，每个批次包含具有相同键值的样本。这对于按特定属性或特征组织数据非常有用。

params.name: group_by_keys
params.desc: group samples according values in the keys. Support for nested keys such as "__dj__stats__.text_len". It is [self.text_key] in default.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 按指定字段的键值对样本分组，适合将多轮对话或同主题文档聚合为组。

operators.name: naive_grouper
operators.summary_en: Group all samples in a dataset into a single batched sample.
operators.summary_zh: 将数据集中的所有样本分组为单个批处理样本。
operators.desc_en: Group all samples in a dataset into a single batched sample. This operator takes a dataset and combines all its samples into one batched sample. If the input dataset is empty, it returns an empty dataset. The resulting batched sample is a dictionary where each key corresponds to a list of values from all samples in the dataset.
operators.desc_zh: 将数据集中的所有样本合并成一个批次样本。 该算子接受一个数据集，并将其所有样本合并为一个批次样本。如果输入的数据集为空，则返回一个空的数据集。生成的批次样本是一个字典，其中每个键对应于数据集中所有样本的值列表。

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 将所有样本归入同一组，用于需要全局聚合操作（如统计摘要）的流水线场景。

operators.name: naive_reverse_grouper
operators.summary_en: Split batched samples into individual samples.
operators.summary_zh: 将批处理的样品分成单个样品。
operators.desc_en: Split batched samples into individual samples. This operator processes a dataset by splitting each batched sample into individual samples. It also handles and optionally exports batch metadata. - If a sample contains 'batch_meta', it is separated and can be exported to a specified path. - The operator converts the remaining data from a dictionary of lists to a list of dictionaries, effectively unbatching the samples. - If `batch_meta_export_path` is provided, the batch metadata is written to this file in JSON format, one entry per line. - If no samples are present in the dataset, the original dataset is returned.
operators.desc_zh: 将批量样本拆分为单个样本。 该算子通过将每个批量样本拆分为单个样本来处理数据集。它还处理并可选地导出批量元数据。 - 如果样本包含 'batch_meta'，则将其分离并可以导出到指定路径。 - 该算子将剩余数据从字典列表转换为字典列表，从而取消批量样本。 - 如果提供了 `batch_meta_export_path`，则批量元数据将以 JSON 格式写入此文件，每行一个条目。 - 如果数据集中没有样本，则返回原始数据集。

params.name: batch_meta_export_path
params.desc: the path to export the batch meta. Just drop the batch meta if it is None.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 将分组后的数据还原为独立样本，与grouper配对使用，完成聚合后的样本展开。

operators.name: agent_bad_case_signal_mapper
operators.summary_en: Attach structured bad-case *signals* and a conservative *tier* to each sample.
operators.summary_zh: 将结构化的坏情况 * 信号 * 和保守 * 层 * 附加到每个样本。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 对智能体轨迹中的失败/错误案例打信号标签，用于Agent训练数据的质量筛查。

operators.name: agent_dialog_normalize_mapper
operators.summary_en: Normalize agent format (messages + choices) to DJ fields.
operators.summary_zh: 将代理格式 (消息选择) 标准化为DJ字段。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 将不同格式的智能体对话轨迹统一为标准格式，是Agent数据清洗流水线的前置步骤。

operators.name: agent_insight_llm_mapper
operators.summary_en: Synthesize stats + LLM eval text into ``meta.agent_insight_llm`` (JSON).
operators.summary_zh: 将stats LLM eval文本合成为 ''meta.agent_insight_llm ''(JSON)。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 调用LLM对智能体轨迹生成洞察分析，用于丰富Agent训练数据的元信息。

operators.name: agent_skill_insight_mapper
operators.summary_en: Summarize agent_tool_types and agent_skill_types into insights via LLM.
operators.summary_zh: 通过大语言模型将代理工具类型和代理技能类型总结为洞察。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 用LLM分析智能体轨迹中的技能调用并生成洞察，适合Agent能力评估与数据标注。

operators.name: agent_tool_relevance_mapper
operators.summary_en: Rough fit between tools/capabilities and the user task (uses meta tool tags).
operators.summary_zh: 工具/功能与用户任务之间的粗略匹配 (使用元工具标签)。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 评估智能体轨迹中工具调用与任务目标的相关性，用于过滤低质量工具调用样本。

operators.name: agent_tool_type_mapper
operators.summary_en: Set primary_tool_type and dominant_tool_types from meta.agent_tool_types.
operators.summary_zh: 从meta.Agent_ tool_types设置primary_tool_type和dominant_tool_types。
operators.zh_usage_tip: 对智能体轨迹中的工具调用类型进行分类标注，便于按工具类型分析和筛选数据。

operators.name: agent_trace_coherence_mapper
operators.summary_en: Coherence of the flattened session ``text`` (goal focus, few detours).
operators.summary_zh: 扁平化会话 “文本” 的连贯性 (目标集中，少走弯路)。
operators.zh_label: 智能体轨迹连贯性评估
operators.zh_usage_tip: 评估智能体多步轨迹的逻辑连贯性，用于筛除推理链断裂的低质量Agent轨迹。

operators.name: audio_add_gaussian_noise_mapper
operators.summary_en: Mapper to add Gaussian noise to audio samples.
operators.summary_zh: 映射器将高斯噪声添加到音频样本。
operators.desc_en: Mapper to add Gaussian noise to audio samples. This operator adds Gaussian noise to audio data with a specified probability. The amplitude of the noise is randomly chosen between `min_amplitude` and `max_amplitude`. If `save_dir` is provided, the modified audio files are saved in that directory; otherwise, they are saved in the same directory as the input files. The `p` parameter controls the probability of applying this transformation to each sample. If no audio is present in the sample, it is returned unchanged.
operators.desc_zh: 向音频样本添加高斯噪声的映射器。 该算子以指定的概率向音频数据添加高斯噪声。噪声的幅度在`min_amplitude`和`max_amplitude`之间随机选择。如果提供了`save_dir`，则修改后的音频文件将保存在该目录中；否则，它们将保存在与输入文件相同的目录中。`p`参数控制对每个样本应用此转换的概率。如果样本中没有音频，则原样返回。

params.name: min_amplitude
params.desc: float unit: linear amplitude. Default: 0.001. Minimum noise amplification factor.

params.name: max_amplitude
params.desc: float unit: linear amplitude. Default: 0.015. Maximum noise amplification factor.

params.name: p
params.desc: float range: [0.0, 1.0].  Default: 0.5. The probability of applying this transform.

params.name: save_dir
params.desc: str. Default: None. The directory where generated audio files will be stored. If not specified, outputs will be saved in the same directory as their corresponding input files. This path can alternatively be defined by setting the `DJ_PRODUCED_DATA_DIR` environment variable.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 向音频样本添加可控高斯噪声做数据增强，提升语音模型的噪声鲁棒性。

operators.name: audio_ffmpeg_wrapped_mapper
operators.summary_en: Wraps FFmpeg audio filters for processing audio files in a dataset.
operators.summary_zh: 包装FFmpeg音频过滤器，用于处理数据集中的音频文件。
operators.desc_en: Wraps FFmpeg audio filters for processing audio files in a dataset. This operator applies specified FFmpeg audio filters to the audio files in the dataset. It supports passing custom filter parameters and global arguments to the FFmpeg command line. The processed audio files are saved to a specified directory or the same directory as the input files if no save directory is provided. The `DJ_PRODUCED_DATA_DIR` environment variable can also be used to set the save directory. If no filter name is provided, the audio files remain unmodified. The operator updates the source file paths in the dataset after processing.
operators.desc_zh: 包装FFmpeg音频滤镜以处理数据集中的音频文件。 该算子应用指定的FFmpeg音频滤镜到数据集中的音频文件。它支持传递自定义滤镜参数和全局参数到FFmpeg命令行。处理后的音频文件将保存到指定目录，或者如果没有提供保存目录，则保存到与输入文件相同的目录中。还可以使用`DJ_PRODUCED_DATA_DIR`环境变量设置保存目录。如果没有提供滤镜名称，音频文件将保持不变。算子在处理后更新数据集中的源文件路径。

params.name: filter_name
params.desc: ffmpeg audio filter name.

params.name: filter_kwargs
params.desc: keyword-arguments passed to ffmpeg filter.

params.name: global_args
params.desc: list-arguments passed to ffmpeg command-line.

params.name: capture_stderr
params.desc: whether to capture stderr.

params.name: overwrite_output
params.desc: whether to overwrite output file.

params.name: save_dir
params.desc: The directory where generated audio files will be stored. If not specified, outputs will be saved in the same directory as their corresponding input files. This path can alternatively be defined by setting the `DJ_PRODUCED_DATA_DIR` environment variable.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用FFmpeg对音频做重采样、格式转换、剪切等处理，是音频数据预处理的通用工具。

operators.name: calibrate_qa_mapper
operators.summary_en: Calibrates question-answer pairs based on reference text using an API model.
operators.summary_zh: 使用API模型根据参考文本校准问答对。
operators.desc_en: Calibrates question-answer pairs based on reference text using an API model. This operator uses a specified API model to calibrate question-answer pairs, making them more detailed and accurate. It constructs the input prompt by combining the reference text and the question-answer pair, then sends it to the API for calibration. The output is parsed to extract the calibrated question and answer. The operator retries the API call and parsing up to a specified number of times in case of errors. The default system prompt, input templates, and output pattern can be customized. The operator supports additional parameters for model initialization and sampling.
operators.desc_zh: 根据参考文本使用API模型校准问答对。 该算子使用指定的API模型来校准问答对，使其更加详细和准确。它通过将参考文本和问答对结合起来构建输入提示，然后将其发送到API进行校准。输出被解析以提取校准后的问题和答案。如果出现错误，算子会重试API调用和解析，最多重试指定次数。默认的系统提示、输入模板和输出模式可以自定义。该算子支持用于模型初始化和采样的附加参数。

params.name: api_model
params.desc: API model name.

params.name: api_endpoint
params.desc: URL endpoint for the API.

params.name: response_path
params.desc: Path to extract content from the API response. Defaults to 'choices.0.message.content'.

params.name: system_prompt
params.desc: System prompt for the calibration task.

params.name: input_template
params.desc: Template for building the model input.

params.name: reference_template
params.desc: Template for formatting the reference text.

params.name: qa_pair_template
params.desc: Template for formatting question-answer pairs.

params.name: output_pattern
params.desc: Regular expression for parsing model output.

params.name: try_num
params.desc: The number of retry attempts when there is an API call error or output parsing error.

params.name: model_params
params.desc: Parameters for initializing the API model.

params.name: sampling_params
params.desc: Extra parameters passed to the API call. e.g {'temperature': 0.9, 'top_p': 0.95}

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: Extra keyword arguments.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 调用LLM对已有问答对的质量进行校准优化，适合提升SFT训练数据的准确性。

operators.name: calibrate_query_mapper
operators.summary_en: Calibrate query in question-answer pairs based on reference text.
operators.summary_zh: 基于参考文本校准问答对中的查询。
operators.desc_en: Calibrate query in question-answer pairs based on reference text. This operator adjusts the query (question) in a question-answer pair to be more detailed and accurate, while ensuring it can still be answered by the original answer. It uses a reference text to inform the calibration process. The calibration is guided by a system prompt, which instructs the model to refine the question without adding extraneous information. The output is parsed to extract the calibrated query, with any additional content removed.
operators.desc_zh: 基于参考文本校准问答对中的查询。 该算子调整问答对中的查询（问题），使其更加详细和准确，同时确保其仍能由原始答案回答。它使用参考文本来指导校准过程。校准过程由系统提示引导，指示模型在不添加无关信息的情况下细化问题。输出被解析以提取校准后的查询，并移除任何附加内容。

params.name: api_model
params.desc: API model name.

params.name: api_endpoint
params.desc: URL endpoint for the API.

params.name: response_path
params.desc: Path to extract content from the API response. Defaults to 'choices.0.message.content'.

params.name: system_prompt
params.desc: System prompt for the calibration task.

params.name: input_template
params.desc: Template for building the model input.

params.name: reference_template
params.desc: Template for formatting the reference text.

params.name: qa_pair_template
params.desc: Template for formatting question-answer pairs.

params.name: output_pattern
params.desc: Regular expression for parsing model output.

params.name: try_num
params.desc: The number of retry attempts when there is an API call error or output parsing error.

params.name: model_params
params.desc: Parameters for initializing the API model.

params.name: sampling_params
params.desc: Extra parameters passed to the API call. e.g {'temperature': 0.9, 'top_p': 0.95}

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: Extra keyword arguments.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 对问答数据中的查询语句做校准改写，提升指令清晰度，适合SFT数据精炼场景。

operators.name: calibrate_response_mapper
operators.summary_en: Calibrate response in question-answer pairs based on reference text.
operators.summary_zh: 根据参考文本校准问答对中的回答。
operators.desc_en: Calibrate response in question-answer pairs based on reference text. This mapper calibrates the 'response' part of a question-answer pair by using a reference text. It aims to make the response more detailed and accurate while ensuring it still answers the original question. The calibration process uses a default system prompt, which can be customized. The output is stripped of any leading or trailing whitespace.
operators.desc_zh: 基于参考文本校准问答对中的响应。 该映射器通过使用参考文本来校准问答对中的“响应”部分。它的目标是使响应更加详细和准确，同时确保它仍然能够回答原始问题。校准过程使用默认的系统提示，该提示可以自定义。输出去除了任何前导或尾随空白。

params.name: api_model
params.desc: API model name.

params.name: api_endpoint
params.desc: URL endpoint for the API.

params.name: response_path
params.desc: Path to extract content from the API response. Defaults to 'choices.0.message.content'.

params.name: system_prompt
params.desc: System prompt for the calibration task.

params.name: input_template
params.desc: Template for building the model input.

params.name: reference_template
params.desc: Template for formatting the reference text.

params.name: qa_pair_template
params.desc: Template for formatting question-answer pairs.

params.name: output_pattern
params.desc: Regular expression for parsing model output.

params.name: try_num
params.desc: The number of retry attempts when there is an API call error or output parsing error.

params.name: model_params
params.desc: Parameters for initializing the API model.

params.name: sampling_params
params.desc: Extra parameters passed to the API call. e.g {'temperature': 0.9, 'top_p': 0.95}

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: Extra keyword arguments.

operators.zh_usage_tip: 用LLM对问答数据中的回复进行改写校准，提升SFT训练数据的准确性和流畅度。

operators.name: chinese_convert_mapper
operators.summary_en: Mapper to convert Chinese text between Traditional, Simplified, and Japanese Kanji.
operators.summary_zh: 映射器在繁体、简体和日文汉字之间转换中文文本。
operators.desc_en: Mapper to convert Chinese text between Traditional, Simplified, and Japanese Kanji. This operator converts Chinese text based on the specified mode. It supports conversions between Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese (including Taiwan and Hong Kong variants), and Japanese Kanji. The conversion is performed using a pre-defined set of rules. The available modes include 's2t' for Simplified to Traditional, 't2s' for Traditional to Simplified, and other specific variants like 's2tw', 'tw2s', 's2hk', 'hk2s', 's2twp', 'tw2sp', 't2tw', 'tw2t', 'hk2t', 't2hk', 't2jp', and 'jp2t'. The operator processes text in batches and applies the conversion to the specified text key in the samples.
operators.desc_zh: 转换中文文本在繁体、简体和日文汉字之间的映射器。 该算子根据指定的模式转换中文文本。它支持简体中文、繁体中文（包括台湾和香港变体）以及日文汉字之间的转换。转换使用预定义的一组规则进行。可用模式包括：'s2t' 从简体到繁体，'t2s' 从繁体到简体，以及其他特定变体如 's2tw', 'tw2s', 's2hk', 'hk2s', 's2twp', 'tw2sp', 't2tw', 'tw2t', 'hk2t', 't2hk', 't2jp', 和 'jp2t'。该算子批量处理文本，并对样本中指定的文本键应用转换。

params.name: mode
params.desc: Choose the mode to convert Chinese: s2t: Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese,  t2s: Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese,  s2tw: Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese (Taiwan Standard),  tw2s: Traditional Chinese (Taiwan Standard) to Simplified Chinese,  s2hk: Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong variant),  hk2s: Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong variant) to Simplified Chinese,  s2twp: Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese (Taiwan Standard) with Taiwanese idiom,  tw2sp: Traditional Chinese (Taiwan Standard) to Simplified Chinese with Mainland Chinese idiom,  t2tw: Traditional Chinese to Traditional Chinese (Taiwan Standard),  tw2t: Traditional Chinese (Taiwan standard) to Traditional Chinese,  hk2t: Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong variant) to Traditional Chinese,  t2hk: Traditional Chinese to Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong variant),  t2jp: Traditional Chinese Characters (Kyūjitai) to New Japanese Kanji,  jp2t: New Japanese Kanji (Shinjitai) to Traditional Chinese Characters,

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 在简繁中文或日文汉字间互转，用于统一多源中文语料的字形风格。

operators.name: clean_copyright_mapper
operators.summary_en: Cleans copyright comments at the beginning of text samples.
operators.summary_zh: 清除文本示例开头的版权注释。
operators.desc_en: Cleans copyright comments at the beginning of text samples. This operator removes copyright comments from the start of text samples. It identifies and strips multiline comments that contain the word "copyright" using a regular expression. It also greedily removes lines starting with comment markers like `//`, `#`, or `--` at the beginning of the text, as these are often part of copyright headers. The operator processes each sample individually but can handle batches for efficiency.
operators.desc_zh: 清理文本样本开头的版权声明。 该算子从文本样本的开头删除版权声明。它使用正则表达式识别并删除包含“copyright”一词的多行注释。它还贪心地删除文本开头以注释标记如 `//`, `#` 或 `--` 开头的行，因为这些通常是版权声明的一部分。该算子单独处理每个样本，但为了效率也可以批量处理。

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 去除文本中的版权声明行，适合清洗网页抓取或书籍类语料中的法律文本干扰。

operators.name: clean_email_mapper
operators.summary_en: Cleans email addresses from text samples using a regular expression.
operators.summary_zh: 使用正则表达式从文本示例中清除电子邮件地址。
operators.desc_en: Cleans email addresses from text samples using a regular expression. This operator removes or replaces email addresses in the text based on a regular expression pattern. By default, it uses a standard pattern to match email addresses, but a custom pattern can be provided. The matched email addresses are replaced with a specified replacement string, which defaults to an empty string. The operation is applied to each text sample in the batch. If no email address is found in a sample, it remains unchanged.
operators.desc_zh: 使用正则表达式从文本样本中清理电子邮件地址。 此算子基于正则表达式模式删除或替换文本中的电子邮件地址。默认情况下，它使用标准模式匹配电子邮件地址，但可以提供自定义模式。匹配到的电子邮件地址将被替换为指定的替换字符串，默认为空字符串。该操作应用于批次中的每个文本样本。如果样本中没有找到电子邮件地址，则保持不变。

params.name: pattern
params.desc: regular expression pattern to search for within text.

params.name: repl
params.desc: replacement string, default is empty string.

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 从文本中删除电子邮件地址，是隐私合规数据处理的基础步骤。

operators.name: clean_html_mapper
operators.summary_en: Cleans HTML code from text samples, converting HTML to plain text.
operators.summary_zh: 从文本示例中清除HTML代码，将HTML转换为纯文本。
operators.desc_en: Cleans HTML code from text samples, converting HTML to plain text. This operator processes text samples by removing HTML tags and converting HTML elements to a more readable format. Specifically, it replaces `<li>` and `<ol>` tags with newline and bullet points. The Selectolax HTML parser is used to extract the text content from the HTML. This operation is performed in a batched manner, making it efficient for large datasets.
operators.desc_zh: 将HTML代码从文本样本中清理，将HTML转换为纯文本。 此算子通过删除HTML标签并将HTML元素转换为更易读的格式来处理文本样本。具体来说，它将`<li>`和`<ol>`标签替换为换行符和项目符号。使用Selectolax HTML解析器从HTML中提取文本内容。此操作以批量方式执行，使其适用于大型数据集。

params.name: args
params.desc: extra args

params.name: kwargs
params.desc: extra args

operators.zh_usage_tip: 去除文本中残留的HTML标签，适合处理网页抓取的原始语料。

operators.name: clean_ip_mapper
operators.summary_en: Cleans IPv4 and IPv6 addresses from text samples.
operators.summary_zh: 从文本示例中清除IPv4和IPv6地址。
operators.desc_en: Cleans IPv4 and IPv6 addresses from text samples. This operator removes or replaces IPv4 and IPv6 addresses in the text. It uses a regular expression to identify and clean the IP addresses. By default, it replaces the IP addresses with an empty string, effectively removing them.
